/usr/bin/ar qc libtint_lang_spirv_reader_lower.a CMakeFiles/tint_lang_spirv_reader_lower.dir/lang/spirv/reader/lower/atomics.cc.o CMakeFiles/tint_lang_spirv_reader_lower.dir/lang/spirv/reader/lower/builtins.cc.o CMakeFiles/tint_lang_spirv_reader_lower.dir/lang/spirv/reader/lower/decompose_strided_array.cc.o CMakeFiles/tint_lang_spirv_reader_lower.dir/lang/spirv/reader/lower/decompose_strided_matrix.cc.o CMakeFiles/tint_lang_spirv_reader_lower.dir/lang/spirv/reader/lower/lower.cc.o CMakeFiles/tint_lang_spirv_reader_lower.dir/lang/spirv/reader/lower/shader_io.cc.o CMakeFiles/tint_lang_spirv_reader_lower.dir/lang/spirv/reader/lower/texture.cc.o CMakeFiles/tint_lang_spirv_reader_lower.dir/lang/spirv/reader/lower/transpose_row_major.cc.o CMakeFiles/tint_lang_spirv_reader_lower.dir/lang/spirv/reader/lower/vector_element_pointer.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtint_lang_spirv_reader_lower.a
